scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && poetry run python -m uvicorn src.agent_api.main:app --reload --port 8002
scripts.dev:separate: echo 'Run these in separate terminals:' && echo '  npm run dev:frontend  # http://localhost:3000' && echo '  npm run dev:backend   # http://localhost:8002'
scripts.gen:db:types: cd tools/configs && supabase gen types typescript --project-id sbsjrdulhrmoylwumsyf > ../../apps/frontend/types/database.ts
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
